title: Intensely Caramelized Mediterranean Kielbasa Skillet
description: A paleo-friendly dish featuring caramelized kielbasa and Mediterranean flavors, cooked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet. This romantic and fresh skillet is perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced kielbasa to the skillet and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped tomato and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until the tomato is tender, about 3 minutes.
Reduce the heat to medium-low and cook for an additional 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the kielbasa is intensely caramelized.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese and cook until melted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
